seniority.level: Senior IC (likely Senior PM / Staff PM)
level_signals: 6+ years of product management experience, majority in growth focused roles
Comp range $305K-$385K base, consistent with Senior or Staff-level IC at Anthropic
Expected to develop and execute product strategy independently

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 6+ years of product management experience, majority in growth focused roles
Experience driving growth for API, developer platform, or technical / usage-based products
Strong analytical skills, and experience with A/B testing and funnel optimization
Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills
Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, ambiguous environment
Passion for AI technology and its potential impact on society
Technical background or ability to work effectively with engineering teams
Bachelor's degree or an equivalent combination of education, training, and/or experience

scope.surface: Claude Platform (platform.claude.com) — API console, onboarding, docs, billing, self-serve upgrade paths
scope.business_model: B2B and B2D (developer-facing), usage-based API monetization
core_responsibilities: Develop and execute a product strategy focused on driving Claude Platform growth metrics such as acquisition, activation, monetization
Lead the ideation, development, and launch of growth features across our API product – onboarding, console, docs, billing, and self-serve upgrade paths
Analyze product metrics and user feedback to identify opportunities and optimize performance
Collaborate with engineering, design, developer relations, and marketing teams to deliver high-impact growth initiatives
Conduct user research to understand customer needs and pain points
Define and track key performance indicators (KPIs) for API growth
Balance rapid iteration with our commitment to AI safety and ethics

compensation.equity_form: optional equity donation matching mentioned (suggests options/RSUs are part of package)

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and highly competitive ($305K-$385K base)
Clear product surface and ownership (Claude Platform API growth funnel)
Encourages applications from candidates who don't meet every qualification
Explicitly mentions commitment to diverse perspectives
Cross-functional team structure (engineering, design, devrel, marketing, data science) well-articulated
red_flags: Hybrid policy requires at least 25% office time in San Francisco — eliminates fully-remote candidates
Compensation range is wide ($80K spread), suggesting significant level ambiguity internally
Very few explicit nice-to-haves listed, making it hard to differentiate candidates at the margin

ambiguities: Technical background requirement is stated as 'Technical background OR ability to work effectively with engineering teams' — this is an or-condition, making it softer than a strict technical background requirement. Classified as hard due to unconditional bullet placement, but bridgeable.
Compensation range ($305K-$385K) is unusually wide; it is unclear whether this reflects a single level or spans multiple internal levels (e.g., Senior PM to Staff PM).
